title: CodeGrind: Boost DS&A Practice with AI-guided Challenges
summary: Showcase how CodeGrind pairs LeetCode-style problems with Azure OpenAI AI assistant for guided learning, dynamic scoring, and immersive tower-defense-themed visualization.
core_message: CodeGrind blends hands-on DS&A practice with AI-assisted problem solving, real-time code execution, and a cyberpunk-themed learning environment. See how AI guidance and live feedback accelerate mastery without leaving the platform.
cta: Try a guided DS&A challenge now and compare AI-assisted reasoning vs. solo attempts.
visual_brief: A short demo video: split-screen showing a LeetCode-style problem, AI assistant chat with GPT-4o, and the real-time code editor executing test cases; include subtle CodeGrind branding and tower-defense visuals in the background.

media.selection_reason: No public blob assets were available, so the workflow will generate a review image from the brief.
